name: Ham
oracleText:
Haste
Whenever Ham attacks, target creature can't block this turn.
Whenever Ham deals combat damage to a player, you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards.
flavorText: "And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father." — Genesis 9:22
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the Wikimedia Commons file "Drunkenness of Noah" for Ham's old-master treatment.
title: Father of Canaan
